title: Silkless Touch (Challenge Version)
description: Makes almost every block minable without silk touch, turning the game into a challenge.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9bab5716445e0a1648e1c8d94a5b8dc1e75d2785.png)

This data packs makes almost every block drop in it's original form, as if you had silk touch. This makes it practically a challenge, because you can't get stone, ores etc.

## Minable Blocks
- All types of Leaves
- All Mushroom Blocks
- All Deepslate Ores
- All Regular Ores
- All Nether Ores
- Amethyst Cluster
- Bookshelf
- Clay
- Crimson Nylium
- Warped Nylium
- Deepslate
- Stone
- Glowstone
- Grass Block
- Gravel
- Mycelium
- Podzol
- Snow Block [Requires a Shovel]
- Snow [Requires a Shovel]
- Twisting Vines
- Weeping Vines

\+ All blocks from the [base version](https://modrinth.com/datapack/silkless-touch)
